title: ageratina roanensis
intro: Ageratina roanensis, also known as Mountain Silver Top, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. It is a member of the mint family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ageratina roanensis include its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Ageratina roanensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
